zh.Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾
zh.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Pope於1465年出生在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾時，他的父親John Pope III30歲，母親Mourning MacKinne25歲。他於1482年與Elizabeth Johnston在英國英格蘭素福爾可米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1540年7月11日在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾
zh-hans.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Pope于1465年出生在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾时，他的父亲John Pope III30岁，母亲Mourning MacKinne25岁。他于1482年与Elizabeth Johnston在英国英格兰素福爾可米爾登哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1540年7月11日在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Pope was born in 1465, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, his father, John Pope III, was 30 and his mother, Mourning MacKinne, was 25. He married Elizabeth Johnston in 1482, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 11 July 1540, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Pope est né en 1465, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Pope III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mourning MacKinne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Johnston en 1482, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Pope 1465 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Pope III 30 und seine Mutter Mourning MacKinne 25. Er hat 1482 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Johnston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 11. Juli 1540 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Pope è nato il nel 1465 nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Pope III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mourning MacKinne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Johnston nel 1482, nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 11 luglio 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Popeが1465年にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルで生まれた時，父John Pope IIIは30歳，母Mourning MacKinneは25歳であった。1482年にイギリスイギリススフォルクミルデンハルでElizabeth Johnstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1540年7月11日に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Pope(이)가 1465년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pope III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mourning MacKinne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 미데홀에서 Elizabeth Johnston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1540년 7월 11일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Pope nasceu em 1465, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Pope III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mourning MacKinne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Johnston em 1482, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Pope родился в 1465 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Pope III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mourning MacKinne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Johnston в 1482 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 11 июля 1540 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Pope nació en 1465, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Pope III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mourning MacKinne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Johnston en 1482, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 11 de julio de 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
